# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- All code must follow SOLID principles.
- All public methods and variables must include Chinese+English XML documentation comments.
- All public methods must begin with parameter validity checks (null/empty).
- All Console/Log/exception text must be in English to avoid garbled text.
- Front-end code should be pure Blazor Server .razor components using C# as the only language, minimizing JavaScript and operational complexity.
